name: Lang Lang
abstract: Lang Lang (Chinese: 郎朗; pinyin: Láng Lǎng; born 14 June 1982) is a Chinese classical pianist. He has performed with major orchestras around the world and appeared at many leading concert halls.

about_quotes.speaker: Harold Mabern
about_quotes.evidence: Herbie just did a George Gershwin classical Chopin type concert with a Chinese piano player named Lang Lang.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harold Mabern interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, March 31, 2010

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: Herbie went on a tour with Lang Lang. He said in the dressing room, four classical pianists, kids, came back, Asian, and they said, “We’re improvising now.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Shorter — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
